mechanism_narrative: Near-zero federal funds rates sustain equity valuations by minimizing discount rates and encouraging risk-taking, generating positive forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are negative in >55% of observations when FEDFUNDS remains below 0.5%.

mechanism_narrative: An unemployment rate falling below the 8.0% threshold signals labor market tightening that boosts corporate earnings expectations, driving positive equity returns over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain negative or flat when UNRATE crosses below 8.0% in >60% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts confirms broad-based consumer demand recovery, which translates into sustained positive equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Rank correlation between the joint RSAFS-HOUST signal and 60-day forward returns falls below 0.05 over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Positive industrial production momentum accelerates short-term equity repricing as supply-side capacity utilization improves, yielding positive returns over the next week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative in >50% of periods following positive INDPRO momentum during recovery phases.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation triggers expectations of monetary policy normalization, compressing equity multiples and producing negative forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Positive 20-day returns occur in >65% of instances when CPIAUCSL MoM exceeds 0.3%.

mechanism_narrative: Rising nonfarm payrolls directly increase aggregate consumption and corporate revenue forecasts, generating a persistent positive signal for equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The signal loses predictive power when PAYEMS growth is positive but forward returns are negative in >55% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: A divergence where retail sales growth lags GDP growth indicates weakening consumer demand relative to overall output, forecasting negative equity returns over the next month.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS growth rate falls below GDPC1 growth rate
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in >60% of periods when the RSAFS-GDPC1 divergence condition is met.

mechanism_narrative: High industrial production coexisting with elevated unemployment signals structural labor market inefficiency and potential stagflationary pressures, driving negative equity returns over the next quarter.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO exceeds 95.0 while UNRATE remains above 7.0%
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are positive in >55% of observations when the INDPRO-UNRATE threshold condition is satisfied.
